name: Future Worth of Lump Sum
description: Calculate the future value of a single present amount using compound interest
identification_signal: Single amount invested today, asking what it grows to in the future
frequency: Very Common - appears in 85% of exams

strategy.step_1: Identify P (present amount), i (interest rate per period), and n (number of periods)
strategy.step_2: Use formula F = P(1+i)^n or factor notation F = P(F/P,i,n)
strategy.step_3: Calculate - ensure i is in decimal form (8% = 0.08)
strategy.step_4: Verify: F should be greater than P for positive interest rates

phase_1_recognition.purpose: Learn to identify future worth problems

front.text: What grows a present amount to the future?

spot_it.instructions: Identify which problems require F/P factor

items.explanation: Use F/P to find future worth

steps.title: Identify Variables
steps.instruction: Find P, i, and n from problem statement
steps.why: These are the three required inputs

what_mastery_means: Can solve F/P problems in under 3 minutes
